options.FEELING_PART_OF_COMMUNITY: Feeling part of a community or giving back
options.OPTIMISTIC_OUTLOOK: Optimistic and has a positive outlook about their future
options.UNSURE_OUTLOOK: Not sure and thinks their future could get better or worse
options.NOT_OPTIMISTIC_OUTLOOK: Not optimistic and thinks their future will not get better or may get worse
options.WOULD_LIKE_TO_CHANGE_ASPECTS: There are some aspects they would like to change or do not like
options.HAS_MADE_CHANGES: I have already made positive changes and want to maintain them
options.WANTS_TO_MAKE_CHANGES_KNOWS_HOW_TO: I want to make changes and know how to
options.WANTS_TO_MAKE_CHANGES_NEEDS_HELP: I want to make changes but need help
options.THINKING_ABOUT_MAKING_CHANGES: I am thinking about making changes
options.DOES_NOT_WANT_TO_MAKE_CHANGES: I do not want to make changes
options.DO_NOT_WANT_TO_ANSWER: I do not want to answer
options.YES_ONGOING_SEVERE: Yes, ongoing - severe and documented over a prolonged period of times
options.YES_ONGOING_DURATION_UNKNOWN: Yes, ongoing - duration is not known or there is no link to offending
options.YES_LEARNING_SIGNIFICANTLY_IMPACTED: Yes, their ability to learn is significantly impacted
options.YES_LEARNING_SLIGHTLY_IMPACTED: Yes, their ability to learn is slightly impacted
options.NO_LEARNING_ABILITIES_IMPACT: No, they do not have any conditions or disabilities that impact their ability to learn

health_conditions.text: Does %1 have any physical health conditions?

mental_health_problems.text: Does %1 have any diagnosed or documented mental health problems?

prescribed_physical_health_medications_t.text: Give details if %1 is on prescribed medication or treatment for physical health conditions (optional)

prescribed_mental_health_medications_tre.text: Give details if %1 is on prescribed medication or treatment for mental health problems (optional)

head_injuries.text: Has %1 had a head injury or any illness affecting the brain?

impact_on_learning_abilities.text: Does %1 have any conditions or disabilities that impact their ability to learn? (optional)

cope_with_day_to_day_life.text: Is %1 able to cope with day-to-day life?

suicidal_tendencies.text: Has %1 ever attempted suicide or had suicidal thoughts?

feeling_about_future_health_wellbeing.text: How does %1 feel about their future?

helped_during_periods_good_health_wellbe.text: What's helped %1 during periods of good health and wellbeing? (optional)

changes_to_health_wellbeing.text: Does %1 want to make changes to their health and wellbeing?

strengths_protective_factors_health_well.text: Are there any strengths or protective factors related to %1 health and wellbeing?

serious_harm_health_wellbeing.text: Is %1 health and wellbeing linked to risk of serious harm?

risk_of_reoffending_health_wellbeing.text: Is %1 health and wellbeing linked to risk of reoffending?
